review: One of the best decisions my husband and I have made when we decided to relocate from Asheville, North Carolina was selecting Max Burrage of Cohen Group as our agent. Max kept in touch with us while we were still in Asheville and kept us abreast of the housing market trend. After we arrived Max went to every house showing with us which was quite a number of houses and gave us valuable suggestions. Max was very knowledgeable about the market here in Bellingham and was very helpful during our search. Max was very responsive and answered our questions and demands instantly even on weekends. We liked that Max was an happy-go-lucky kind of guy and very pleasant to work with. He and his team in Cohen group, including Leo who is the owner of Cohen, were very supportive and helpful. We appreciated having them as our realtor and highly recommend them to anyone looking to buy or sell a home!

So you are looking at this review because you are trying to find a solid person to help you buy or sell one of the most expensive things you will ever purchase or sell...no stress, right?!?!Because internet reviews are strange, you don't know me from anyone: I moved to the area from upstate NY and owned four homes over 20 years working with some fantastic people - one sold my home for asking in 2009; talk about witchcraft. Of course, some were not-so-fantastic, but let's not dwell on them!I cyberstalked Leo online and liked the "vibe" I saw on social media and other publications. I liked that his group liked working together, and instead of talking about community, these people had actual events around town to build community.What a fantastic surprise to find out they are all EXACTLY like they seem online. Leo and his gang of happy agents, marketers, researchers, and all-around helpful types came through for me. The most important part is their honesty and directness - you need that when making such big decisions.Plus, they are all just lovely people. I hope this doesn't get me in trouble, but Chris notarized things for me along the way, and Leo helped me with my move. That's way more than service, that is neighborliness. What else can you ask for?If it isn't clear, I think you'd be crazy not to hire these folks for your next big move!
Leo and team were amazing to work with!!! They stayed on top of our transaction and communicated clearly all along the way. I will use him again!!! Thanks Leo and team.

A friend recommended Leo and the Cohen Group when we were planning our home sale in another state. We're so grateful to have found Leo as our buyer's agent. We knew only a little about Bellingham from previous visits, and we hadn't even listed our previous home yet, so there were a lot of unknowns, and we were feeling pretty stressed. This was at the height of the bidding-war craziness, right before the Fed started raising rates, and the market was anyone's guess. From day one, Leo had our trust. He was a calming, realistic, and knowledgeable guide. As a long-time Bellingham-ian himself, he knew neighborhoods and builders, had a clear idea of price-to-value for a given home, and he had a lot of experience with purchasing strategies. We never felt rushed, and we always felt like he just wanted us to find the right home. Leo took the time to figure out what WE wanted and steered us in productive directions. He and his team were timely and proactive communicators at every step of the process (even out of state, well before we could start looking for a place in person), and he patiently handled every question and concern we threw at him. He also helped us find a short-term rental that didn't cost a fortune. That saved our bacon! Really helped us be here and look around without feeling rushed. We couldn't be more pleased with Leo and his team, and we'll recommend them to anyone who's considering a move to the Bham area.

Chris made our dreams of unlikely homeownership a reality. We were in a unique position to buy the home we were currently renting. This was our first experience as homebuyers and Chris held our hand the entire time. I don't think I've ever experienced the kind of customer service he provided us. He immediately contacted us after we were referred to him by work friends. He never left our side. I heard from him nearly everyday during the process, sometimes just to check in and ask how we were feeling or if we needed to talk about the stress of buying a home. We developed a warm friendship and he got us in touch with an amazing circle of professionals that treated us to the same unique customer service. Don't pass up an opportunity to work with Chris and his amazing group! I honestly don't think we would have purchased this house without Chris and Cohen Group NW.

businessResponse.comment: Allyson! Thank you for writing such an amazing review - we appreciate you!

review: Leo Cohen is an absolute joy to work with. He manages to make the daunting task of finding a property in this competitive area seem easy. He is reassuring, composed, and confident in his abilities as a realtor - as he should be, given the work he produces! He takes the time to get to know his clients and caters the experience he provides to their specific needs. Cohen Group NW is changing the game in Whatcom County. From their charitable contributions to their full-service concierge service, the experience I have had is truly unlike any other I have had before. I can't end this review without also thanking Christopher Lee for bringing his positive attitude to every single interaction we had. Negotiating deals on an investment property isn't a walk in the park, but he sure made it feel that way!Thanks again for all of your hard work, and we can't wait to buy another property from you soon (once we finish this darn renovation)!

Chris is truly an exceptional real estate agent! He had such a great and positive attitude throughout the whole process. We trust him completely and greatly value his thoughtful perspectives, hard work, and high level of knowledge and experience. He always kept us up to date and guided us through every step of the way. It's stressful buying a house and he supported us so wonderfully through all the ups and downs and we ended up with the perfect property for us, which is definitely a reflection of his expertise. We are so thankful and grateful we worked with him! We very highly recommend the Cohen Group NW and Chris specifically for buying property, whoever does is in great hands!

businessResponse.comment: Thank you sir! Appreciate all you do for the Bellingham business community. Thanks for your support!

review: Leo and his team are amazing to work with. Their knowledge of local real estate and their professionalism make them my go to for all things real estate in Bellingham. Add to that they are fun to be around!
